name: Shellfish Soup with Cilantro
recipeIngredient: 24 large shrimp, peeled, deveined, shells reserved
6 ounces green beans, trimmed, cut into half
6 ounces asparagus, trimmed, cut into 3-inch lengths
12 sea scallops, cut horizontally in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy large Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add shrimp shells; sauté for 3 minutes.
3. Add carrots, leeks, and onion; sauté for 5 minutes.
4. Add wine; simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Add water, fresh cilantro, vanilla, and bay leaves. Cover and simmer over low heat for 30 minutes.
6. Strain stock into a large saucepan. (Can be made up to 1 day in advance. Chill.)
7. Bring stock to a boil. Add green beans, asparagus, snow peas, and chopped green onions; simmer for 1 minute.
8. Add shrimp and scallops; simmer until shellfish are cooked through, about 3 minutes.
9. Mix in the remaining chopped green onions.
10. Ladle soup into bowls. Sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
